Off Calendar May-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC, RASIER-CA, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Yakov Wiegmann, Esq. and Matthew Jones, Esq. of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN &DICKER LLP, Tel:415.433.0990, for defendant/moving party Uber Technologies;
John Vanucci, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF JOHN FITZPATRICK YANNUCCI, Tel.415.981.7500, for plaintiff/opposing party.

Plaintiff's counsel contested the court's tentative ruling. The matter was argued.

After arguments, DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC, RASIER-CA, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action is taken under submission by the court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

********************************

After hearing, the court ruled on DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC, RASIER-CA, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action - GRANTED. Order signed. (302/RBU)

Defendant Gordon Phan Aka John Doe No. 1'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Of Plaintiff Randa Moustafa Unilaterally Noticed By Plaintiff'S Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GORDON PHAN'S Motion To Quash Deposition Of Plaintiff Randa Moustafa Unilaterally Noticed By Plaintiff's Counsel. Transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar (Room 301) on the same date at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANT GORDON PHAN AKA JOHN DOE NO. 1'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF RANDA MOUSTAFA UNILATERALLY NOTICED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL (ADDED TO DISCOVERY PER STAFF ATTY. WAS MISCALENDARED IN LAW AND MOTION; EMAIL DATED 4/17/23)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Brian Whittemore, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP, 415.362.6000, for Defendant Gordon Phan aka John Doe #1;
Yakov Wiegmann, Esq. of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP, 415.433.0990, for Defendants Uber, et al. (Note: Mr. Wiegmann is only appearing to observe).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GORDON PHAN AKA JOHN DOE NO. 1'S MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF RANDA MOUSTAFA UNILATERALLY NOTICED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL.

Matter called. Mr. Wiegmann notes that he is not appearing to argue/contest today, that he is appearing only to observe, and that his appearance today does not waive his client's right to arbitration.

Counsel for Defendant Gordon Phan aka John Doe #1 stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Discussions are held. Mr. Whittemore states that the depositions are being suspended until after the motion to quash.

At the conclusion of discussions, the motion is granted.

Mr. Whittemore is prepare the order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Deol at: JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com

Judge Pro Tem: John Paul Deol. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Not Present. Matter not reported. (JPT/302)
